stories.headline: Mali’s Defence Minister Sadio Camara killed amid coordinated attacks
stories.description: Camara’s house in the garrison town of Kati came under attack amid simultaneous attacks across the West African country.

stories.headline: Dunmurry: Homes evacuated after suspected car bomb explodes near police station
stories.description: A security incident is continuing following the incident late on Saturday on the outskirts of Belfast.

stories.headline: King Charles will have 'appropriate security' for US visit, minister says
stories.description: King Charles' US visit will have "appropriate security" after shooting.

stories.headline: At least four people killed in Israeli attacks in Gaza despite ‘ceasefire’
stories.description: Israeli forces keep advancing further into western Gaza, slowly expanding the area of their control in the east.

stories.headline: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill at least five, damage ship in port
stories.description: Ukrainian attacks on Russia injure at least six people in Vologda region and annexed Crimea.
